form.formComment: Comes off a 30 day let-up. Last start ran last in a small field at this track on March 12 over 1710m, 19 len behind Caprichosainfront carrying 57kg at $19.70. The start before that got back early 4th of 7 at this track on February 26 over 1308m, 8 len behind Julie Belle with 57kg at $10.60. Capable of more than she showed last time.

form.formComment: Most recently ran last of 7 at this track on April 2 over 1408m, 27 len behind Entitled Defense carrying 54.5kg at $85.70. The race before that second last of 7 at this track on March 12 over 1308m, 14 len behind Smoked Peach carrying 54.5kg at $75.40. Not doing enough to threaten the top few today.

form.formComment: At debut, ran last of 12 at Turfway Park on February 14 over 1609m, 30 len behind Cady Hill with 52kg at $13.01. Deserves another chance.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). At debut, ran last of 12 at Turfway Park on February 14 over 1609m, 30 len behind Cady Hill with 52kg at $13.01. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, second last in a small field at Laurel on February 6 over 1408m, 30 len behind Stroll Trippin with 56kg at $21.70. Last start ran last of 7 at Laurel on March 20 over 1207m, 21 len behind Eimear carrying 56kg at $27.80. Looks to be making up the numbers.

form.formComment: Last start ran last in a small field at this track on March 21 over 1408m, 25 len behind Bella Italia with 57kg at $13. Before that 2nd of 7 at this track on February 26 over 1308m, 1.5 len behind Julie Belle carrying 57kg at $5.50. Can do much better.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after nine months 4th in a small field at this track on March 20 over 1308m, 15 len behind Close Up with 52.5kg at $8.20. Previously second-up 8th of 10 at Pimlico Turf on May 10 over 1609m, 5 len behind Steam Knot carrying 51kg at $29.70. Among the leading chances.

form.formComment: Returns from a 56-day let-up. Last start raced on the pace when 3rd of 7 at this track on February 14 over 905m, 5.5 len behind Spirit And Truth carrying 54kg at $13. The race before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 8 at this track on January 3 over 905m, 7 len behind Collegeville Queen with 54kg at $19.50. Can't recommend against this lot.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start eased back early on second last in a small field at Timonium on August 24 over 805m, 4 len behind Grosse Ile carrying 55kg at $7.80. Went for a break before returning 5th of 7 at this track on March 28 over 905m, 7 len behind Holy Brick carrying 57kg at $5.80. Improver with definite claims.
